gcp.servicedirectory.projects.locations..description: Gets information about a location.

required.description: Resource name for the location.

gcp.servicedirectory.projects.locations..description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service. This method can be called in two ways: * **List all public locations:** Use the path `GET /v1/locations`. * **List project-visible loc

required.description: The resource that owns the locations collection, if applicable.

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

gcp.servicedirectory.projects.locations..description: Deletes a namespace. This also deletes all services and endpoints in the namespace.

required.description: Required. The name of the namespace to delete.

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.servicedirectory.projects.locations.namespaces.list, iterate response["namespaces"][], extract item["name"] → fill {namespaceId}

gcp.servicedirectory.projects.locations..description: Creates a namespace, and returns the new namespace.

required.description: Required. The resource name of the project and location the namespace will be created in.

gcp.servicedirectory.projects.locations..description: Sets the IAM Policy for a resource (namespace or service only).

required.description: REQUIRED: The resource for which the policy is being specified. See [Resource names](https://cloud.google.com/apis/desig

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.servicedirectory.projects.locations.namespaces.list, iterate response["namespaces"][], extract item["name"] → fill {namespaceId}

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.servicedirectory.projects.locations.namespaces.list, iterate response["namespaces"][], extract item["name"] → fill {namespaceId}

gcp.servicedirectory.projects.locations..description: Gets a namespace.

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.servicedirectory.projects.locations.namespaces.list, iterate response["namespaces"][], extract item["name"] → fill {namespaceId}

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.servicedirectory.projects.locations.namespaces.list, iterate response["namespaces"][], extract item["name"] → fill {namespaceId}
